All Packages

Package Summary
Package
Description
net.sf.jasperreports.engine.xml
 
nonprofitbookkeeping
Coordinates the nonprofit bookkeeping application.
nonprofitbookkeeping.api
Defines the public integration API for nonprofit bookkeeping.
nonprofitbookkeeping.core
Implements core application orchestration.
nonprofitbookkeeping.exception
Provides shared exception types and error semantics.
nonprofitbookkeeping.model
Contains core domain and transfer models.
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.budget
Holds budget-specific model structures.
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.impex
Provides models for import and export workflows.
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
Contains model types for OFX data handling.
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.reports
Defines model structures used by reporting features.
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.scaledger
Contains model types specific to Scale Ledger integration.
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.supplemental
Provides model types for supplemental bookkeeping data.
nonprofitbookkeeping.panels
Contains shared panel-level UI components.
nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence
Implements persistence infrastructure for bookkeeping data.
nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence.supplemental
Provides persistence support for supplemental data.
nonprofitbookkeeping.plugin
Defines the plugin extension point contracts.
nonprofitbookkeeping.plugins.sample
Provides sample plugin implementations.
nonprofitbookkeeping.plugins.scaledger
Contains Scale Ledger plugin implementations.
nonprofitbookkeeping.plugins.scaledger.ui
Provides UI components for the Scale Ledger plugin.
nonprofitbookkeeping.preferences
Manages application preference models and utilities.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports
Coordinates report services and report-level abstractions.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.datasource
Provides data-source query abstractions for reports.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.excel
Implements Excel-based report generation support.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper
Provides JasperReports integration entry points.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.beans
Contains JasperReports bean-layer data carriers.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.generator
Implements concrete Jasper report generators.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.model
Defines model structures used by Jasper report processing.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query
Provides query-building support for Jasper reports.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime
Contains Jasper runtime execution utilities.
nonprofitbookkeeping.service
Implements application service-layer use cases.
nonprofitbookkeeping.service.scaledger
Provides service workflows for Scale Ledger features.
nonprofitbookkeeping.tools
Contains development and command-line tooling utilities.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui
Defines top-level user interface composition and wiring.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions
Contains reusable UI action handlers.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger
Provides Scale Ledger-specific UI actions.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.help
Contains help and guidance UI components.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.helpers
Provides UI helper utilities and support classes.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.javafx.dialogs
Contains JavaFX dialog components.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.javafx.supplemental
Provides JavaFX editors for supplemental data.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels
Contains UI panel implementations for major screens.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.skeletons
Provides skeleton panel templates and scaffolding.
nonprofitbookkeeping.util
Supplies cross-cutting utility classes.
tools.jrxml
